title: Continuation Document
definition: A document that tracks all pending work in a collaborative project.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Think of it as a to-do list for ongoing tasks, keeping everyone on the same page.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A detailed record of all work items that have been started but not yet completed, ensuring efficient progress and avoiding duplication.
difficulty_levels.expert: A living, evolving document that captures the current state of a collaborative project, serving as both an agenda for active tasks and an archive for reference.

extra_fields.insight: The power of documentation in maintaining focus and productivity in collaborative work.
